title: The Shipping Logistics Behind Reshuffling Russian Crude
section_path: The Shipping Logistics Behind Reshuffling Russian Crude
section_path_text: The Shipping Logistics Behind Reshuffling Russian Crude
summary:
Main
Russian crude exports are having to travel farther as the country redirects flows to "friendly" nations. In this insight, we assess the implications for Russia's shipping logistics, and hence the feasibility of this reshuffle. By Dylan Simpson
Ιn the past, Russian crude exports have largely been sent to relatively short-haul destinations.
